creator: benjamin.podszun@gmail.com
text:
Attached an updated patch against the current port.

This
- updates the port to 0.9.2 (the latest version)
- builds, installs, deinstalls cleanly
- runs in my preliminary tests (note: No s2s tested so far)
- runs w/ an updated luasec-0.5 (again: no s2s or TLS - so that means ..
nothing)

Together with my luasec-0.5 bump (discussion on ports@freebsd.org) this
should bring prosody back to a current level.
